summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Credit Management feature and client dashboard. All credit management APIs working (15/15 pytest tests passed). Frontend UI fully functional including overview page, individual client management, and all credit actions (add bonus, set limit, reset, deduct). Credit history tracking verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Credit Management fully tested. All credit actions working: add_bonus (+25 pytest, +20 UI test), set_limit (600→500→0→500), reset, deduct (-15 pytest, -5 pre-reset). Credit history properly tracks all actions with before/after states and admin info.

features_verified.admin_login: PASS - Super admin login with adreej@frameflow.me works
features_verified.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows 4 Total Clients, 4 Active, 0 Meta Connected, 3 Total Posts
features_verified.credit_management_button: PASS - Credit Management button visible on Admin Dashboard
features_verified.credit_overview_page: PASS - Shows all clients with credit info, usage %, bonus badges, Manage buttons
features_verified.individual_client_credit_page: PASS - Shows Credits Used, Monthly Limit, Bonus Credits, Remaining stats
features_verified.add_bonus_action: PASS - Dialog with amount/reason fields, adds credits, updates UI, shows toast
features_verified.set_limit_action: PASS - Sets monthly credit limit, persists correctly
features_verified.reset_action: PASS - Resets credits_used to 0, shows warning, updates reset date
features_verified.deduct_action: PASS - Deducts credits from usage, records in history
features_verified.credit_history: PASS - Shows all actions with timestamps, admin email, before/after states
features_verified.client_dashboard: PASS - Shows greeting, credit meter (0/500), 6 creation modes
features_verified.calendar: PASS - March 2026, Month/Week toggle, day headers
features_verified.analytics: PASS - Demo Mode, Connect Instagram, stats with Indian number format
features_verified.library: PASS - Shows AI generated images with filter tabs
features_verified.session_persistence: PASS - Session persists after page refresh
features_verified.mobile_responsiveness: PASS - Hamburger menu works, sidebar opens correctly

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/credits/overview: PASS - Returns clients array with credit info and totals
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/clients/{client_id}/credi: PASS - Returns detailed credit info with history
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/clients: PASS - Returns list of all clients
